scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd lexidash-backend && npm start" "cd lexidash-preact && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd lexidash-backend && npm start" "cd lexidash-preact && npm run preview"
scripts.install:all: cd lexidash-backend && npm install && cd ../lexidash-preact && npm install
